text: How Ken Paxton courted Donald Trump and won his endorsement - CNN
fullText: It was seemingly the end of the road for Ken Paxton. President Donald Trump was on the verge of endorsing Cornyn, promising to make a choice “soon” and demanding that the candidate he did not endorse drop out. So Paxton tried something new.

text: Asian Stocks to Track US Drop on Inflation Fears: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
